creator: dinjiin@yahoo.com
text:
PATA DVD-R optical drive (NEC ND-2500A) is not detected by the ata(4) driver, even though the ata controller appears to be recognized by FreeBSD.  Can be reproduced with GENERIC and custom kernels (w/ "device atapicd" included), i386 and amd64 editions.  Drive is detected fine using same GENERIC kernel running on an Nv nForce4 platform.

How-To-Repeat: Occurs when booting from installed system and when booting from FreeBSD installation CD.
